data.title: Armata Pharmaceuticals to advance AP-SA02 to Phase 3 after FDA meeting. First bacteriophage company to reach this stage.
data.description: The FDA has approved the progression of AP-SA02 to a Phase 3 study based on data from the Phase 2a diSArm study. Armata Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NYSE American: ARMP) from Los Angeles has become the first bacteriophage company to reach this stage. The announcement was made on January 13, 2026.

data.title: Keeper Security strengthens cyber defenses for Atlassian Williams F1 Team with KeeperPAM, enforcing zero-trust security globally.
data.description: The Atlassian Williams F1 Team is utilizing Keeper Security's unified, cloud-native PAM platform in Chicago to enhance security measures and streamline operations. This collaboration enables the team to enforce zero-trust security protocols and control privileged access globally. The platform is a key tool in maintaining security and efficiency for the team as they work to achieve their goals.

data.title: Hamilton Lane Inc. (Nasdaq: HLNE) to reveal Q3 2025 results on Feb 3, 2026. Period ended Dec 31, 2025.
data.description: In Conshohocken, Pennsylvania, on January 13, 2026, Hamilton Lane Incorporated (Nasdaq: HLNE) announced plans to disclose its financial performance for the third fiscal quarter up to December 31, 2025. This information is set to be made public before the market opens on Tuesday, February 3, 2026. Investors can access the full earnings report and detailed insights following the release.

data.title: New Warrior Cats toy line by Bonkers Toys launched, expanding the beloved book series sales in the US and Canada.
data.description: In San Diego on January 13, 2026, Bonkers Toys revealed the introduction of the Warrior Cats toy line to retail stores, based on the popular book series from Coolabi Group and Harper Collins. This move aims to captivate fans in the U.S. and Canada with these new toys.

data.title: Labcorp now offers MRD testing for cancer recurrence in breast, lung, and colon, covering stages I–III. This detects risks early.
data.description: Labcorp's Molecular Residual Disease (MRD) testing has proven effective in identifying cancer recurrence much earlier, providing a significant advantage over traditional imaging methods. The tests are now being used to track recurrence risk in a range of cancer types, including stage I–III breast cancer, stage I–IIIA non-small cell lung cancer, and stage III colon cancer. This development is crucial in improving patient outcomes and ensuring timely intervention. The advancements were announced in Burlington, North Carolina on January 13, 2026.

data.title: EF Go Ahead Tours launches new food tours catering to culinary travel demand, in partnership with America's Test Kitchen.
data.description: A collaboration between America's Test Kitchen and EF has been extended to provide carefully curated specialty food tours worldwide. Headquartered in Cambridge, Massachusetts, EF Go Ahead Tours, a prominent provider of guided group travel for adults, revealed the introduction of their latest offering, "Food Tours." The partnership aims to offer unique culinary experiences to travelers, showcasing diverse cuisines and cultures. The announcement was made on January 13, 2026, without specifying the duration of the collaboration or the number of tours planned.

data.title: Airedale by Modine offers high-density, low PUE Air-Cooled Chillers for data centers. Jan. 13, 2026, RACINE, Wis. #PRNewswire
data.description: A highly reliable and efficient solution for data centers is the Airedale by Modine Air-Cooled Chillers with Free Cooling. These chillers are known for their high thermal density and low Power Usage Effectiveness (PUE). Based in RACINE, Wis., Airedale by Modine™ is a global leader in critical cooling solutions and is a subsidiary of Modine (NYSE: MOD). The technology has proven to be a top choice for data centers around the world.

data.title: Name Bubbles and Start Early partner to support families from pregnancy through preschool, enhancing early learning and care.
data.description: A collaboration has been formed between Name Bubbles, a renowned company specializing in personalized name labels for children, and Start Early, a leading national nonprofit focused on early learning and care for children up to age five. The partnership, disclosed on January 13, 2026, in Ballston Spa, New York, aims to provide assistance to families, educators, and early childhood programs. This initiative brings together the expertise of both organizations to support the development and well-being of young children across the country.

data.title: 21Shares introduces BOLD fund in London, combining Bitcoin and gold with a 2:1 ratio, tradable in GBP and USD on LSE.
data.description: The 21Shares Bitcoin Gold ETP is divided into a 2:1 ratio, with 66% invested in gold and 33% in Bitcoin. This exchange-traded product is available for trading in both pounds sterling and dollars on the London Stock Exchange.

data.title: SciSparc acquires patents for endoscope market, entering a multi-billion dollar opportunity. Commercialization to start post transaction.
data.description: SciSparc plans to start commercializing the patented technologies right after the completion of the transaction.

data.title: Bowman leading $30M flood control project in Cook County, IL with U.S.'s largest water authority.
data.description: Bowman is spearheading the last phases of planning and obtaining permits for flood control enhancements in Cook County, Illinois.

data.title: Small Satellite Market to reach $32.13 billion in 2030, growing at a CAGR of 28.0% from $9.35 billion in 2025.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of January 13, 2026, reports from MarketsandMarkets™ reveal that the Small Satellite Market is anticipated to increase from USD 9.35 billion in 2025 to USD 32.13 billion by 2030. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 28.0%. The data is presented across 250 market Tables, 80 Figures, and spanning 300 Pages.

data.title: TransUnion to release Q4 2025 results on Feb 12, 2026; conference call at 8:30am CT. Website for updates: http://www.transunion.com/tru.
data.description: TransUnion (NYSE: TRU) is set to release its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter concluding on December 31, 2025. This data will be disclosed through a press release around 6:00 a.m. Central Time (CT) on Thursday, February 12, 2026. A conference call is scheduled for the same day at 8:30 a.m. (CT) to delve into these financial results. Interested individuals can access the press release and a real-time webcast of the earnings conference call on the TransUnion Investor Relations page at http://www.transunion.com/tru.

data.title: BD invests $110M to support US pharmaceutical supply chain, introduces BD Neopak™ Glass Prefillable Syringe in Nebraska.
data.description: BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) has recently announced a significant investment of $110 million to enhance its production capabilities in Columbus, Nebraska. The company is introducing the BD Neopak™ Glass Prefillable Syringe production at this location. This expansion is part of BD's commitment to advancing medical technology globally.
